title: POS Transaction — Bronze Source Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating raw POS transaction records before ingestion into brz_freshsip.pos_transactions_raw. All fields are expected as strings in the raw JSON source.

transaction_id.description: Unique POS transaction identifier assigned by the retailer POS system

retailer_id.description: FreshSip retailer account identifier; must reference a known account in the customer master

sku_id.description: FreshSip product SKU identifier; must reference a known product in the product master

quantity.description: Number of units sold; cast to INTEGER in Silver layer; must be a positive integer string

unit_price.description: Invoice price per unit in USD; cast to DECIMAL in Silver layer

transaction_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the transaction; cast to TIMESTAMP in Silver layer

channel.description: Distribution channel through which the sale occurred

region.description: US geographic region of the transaction

store_id.description: Retailer's internal store location identifier; informational only
